phrases.zh: 你是我穷极一生到不了的天堂
phrases.literal: You are the heaven I cannot reach
phrases.literal_en: You are the heaven I cannot reach

phrases.literal: I still keep longing for you
phrases.literal_en: I still keep longing for you

phrases.literal: This unknown road
phrases.literal_en: This unknown road

phrases.literal: I carry your light in my heart
